sections.heading: These Regulations may be cited as the Citizens Economic Title
sections.text:
1. These Regulations may be cited as the Citizens Economic Title
Empowerment (Reservation Scheme) Regulations, 2019.

sections.heading: In these Regulations, unless the context otherwise requires- Interpretation
sections.text:
2. In these Regulations, unless the context otherwise requires- Interpretation
"commercial cleaning" means the provision of a cleaning
service on a contractual basis;
"citizen empowered company" has the meaning assigned to
the words in the Act; Act. No. 9 of
2006
"citizen influenced company" has the meaning assigned to
the words in the Act; Act. No. 9 of
2006
"citizen owned company" has the meaning assigned to the
words in the Act; and Act. No. 9 of
2006
"targeted citizen" has the meaning assigned to the words in
the Act. Act. No. 9 of
2006

sections.heading: (1) Commercial cleaning is reserved for targeted citizens, Reservation
sections.text:
3. (1) Commercial cleaning is reserved for targeted citizens, Reservation
citizen influenced companies, citizen empowered companies and commercial
cleaning
citizen owned companies.
(2) A non-targeted citizen or company engaged in commercial
cleaning under a contract for commercial cleaning entered into
before the coming into operation of these Regulations shall continue
to operate until expiry of that contract.
PO. Box 30136, 10101, Lusaka, Price K4.00 each
64 Statutory Instruments 15th March, 2019
(3) A non-targeted company wishing to engage or continue
engaging in commercial cleaning shal I become a citizen influenced
company, citizen empowered company or citizen owned company.
( 4) A siate institution and non-state institution shall not engage a
non-targeted citizen or company in commercial cleaning.
General 4. A person who contravenes these Regulations commits an
penalty offence and is liable, on conviction, to a fine not exceeding eight
thousand penalty units, or to imprisonment for a term not exceeding
three years or lo both.
EDGAR C, LUNGU,
LUSAKA President
28th February, 2019
[MCTI.101/4/16)
